allow: Bash(timeout 30 bash -c "until docker compose logs grafana 2>&1 | grep -q 'HTTP Server Listen'; do sleep 2; done")

Bash(curl -s -u admin:admin -X POST http://localhost:3400/api/ds/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"queries\\":[{\\"datasource\\":{\\"uid\\":\\"postgres-metrics\\"},\\"rawSql\\":\\"SELECT run_time::timestamptz AS time, value::float AS rmse FROM batch_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'rmse' ORDER BY run_time\\",\\"format\\":\\"time_series\\",\\"refId\\":\\"A\\"}],\\"from\\":\\"now-30d\\",\\"to\\":\\"now\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); panels=d['dashboard']['panels']; [print\(p['title'], '|', p['targets'][0].get\('format'\), '|', p['targets'][0].get\('rawSql',''\)[:80]\) for p in panels]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); panels=d['dashboard']['panels']; [print\(p['title'], '| format:', p['targets'][0].get\('format'\)\) for p in panels]")

Bash(curl -s -u admin:admin -X POST http://localhost:3400/api/ds/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"queries\\":[{\\"datasource\\":{\\"uid\\":\\"postgres-metrics\\"},\\"rawSql\\":\\"SELECT run_time::timestamptz AS time, value::float AS rmse FROM batch_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'rmse' ORDER BY run_time\\",\\"format\\":\\"time_series\\",\\"refId\\":\\"A\\",\\"dataset\\":\\"\\"}],\\"from\\":\\"now-30d\\",\\"to\\":\\"now\\"}")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['dashboard']; [print\(json.dumps\(p['targets'][0], indent=2\)\) for p in d['panels']]")
Bash(timeout 25 bash -c "until docker compose logs grafana 2>&1 | grep -q 'HTTP Server Listen'; do sleep 2; done")
